member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions
member.summary: Azure Cosmos DB extension

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions.AddAzureCosmosClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings},System.Action{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers as a singleton in the services provided by the . Configures logging and telemetry for the .
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The connection name to use to find a connection string.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the .
member.exception: If required ConnectionString is not provided in configuration section

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions.AddAzureCosmosContainer(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings},System.Action{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers the as a singleton in the services provided by the .
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The connection name to use to find a connection string.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the .
member.remarks: The is registered as a singleton in the services provided by the and does not reuse any existing instances in the DI container. The connection string associated with the must contain the database name and container name or be set in the callback. To interact with multiple containers against the same database, use to register the database and then call for each container.
member.exception: If required ConnectionString is not provided in configuration section

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions.AddKeyedAzureCosmosClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings},System.Action{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers the as a singleton for given in the services provided by the . Configures logging and telemetry for the .
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The name of the component, which is used as the of the service and also to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the .
member.exception: If required ConnectionString is not provided in configuration section

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions.AddKeyedAzureCosmosContainer(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings},System.Action{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers the as a singleton for given in the services provided by the .
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The name of the component, which is used as the of the service and also to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the .
member.remarks: The is registered as a singleton in the services provided by the and does not reuse any existing instances in the DI container. The connection string associated with the must contain the database name and container name or be set in the callback. To interact with multiple containers against the same database, use to register the database and then call for each container.
member.exception: If required ConnectionString is not provided in configuration section

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions.AddAzureCosmosDatabase(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings},System.Action{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers the as a singleton the services provided by the and returns a to support chaining multiple container registrations against the same database.
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The connection name to use to find a connection string.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the .
member.exception: If required ConnectionString is not provided in configuration section

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireMicrosoftAzureCosmosExtensions.AddKeyedAzureCosmosDatabase(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings},System.Action{Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions})
member.summary: Registers the as a singleton for given in the services provided by the and returns a to support chaining multiple container registrations against the same database.
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The name of the component, which is used as the of the service and also to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the .
member.exception: If required ConnectionString is not provided in configuration section

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.

member.name: T:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosDatabaseBuilder
member.summary: Represents a builder that can be used to register multiple container instances against the same Cosmos database connection.

member.name: M:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosDatabaseBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings,Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosClientOptions)
member.summary: Represents a builder that can be used to register multiple container instances against the same Cosmos database connection.

member.name: M:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.CosmosDatabaseBuilder.AddKeyedContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Register a against the database managed with as a keyed singleton.
member.param: The name of the container to register.
member.returns: A that can be used for further chaining.

member.name: T:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings
member.summary: The settings relevant to accessing Azure Cosmos DB.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection string of the Azure Cosmos database to connect to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings.DatabaseName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the database to connect to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings.ContainerName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the container to connect to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings.DisableTracing
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings.AccountEndpoint
member.summary: A referencing the Azure Cosmos DB Endpoint. This is likely to be similar to "https://{account_name}.documents.azure.com".
member.remarks: Must not contain shared access signature. Used along with to establish the connection.

member.name: P:Aspire.Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos.MicrosoftAzureCosmosSettings.Credential
member.summary: Gets or sets the credential used to authenticate to the Azure Cosmos DB endpoint.

member.name: T:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute
member.summary: Attribute used to automatically generate a JSON schema for a component's configuration.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.Path
member.summary: The path corresponding to which config section binds to.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.Type
member.summary: The type that is bound to the configuration. This type will be walked and generate a JSON schema for all the properties.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.ExclusionPaths
member.summary: (optional) The config sections to exclude from the ConfigurationSchema. This is useful if there are properties you don't want to publicize in the config schema.

member.name: T:Aspire.LoggingCategoriesAttribute
member.summary: Provides information to describe the logging categories produced by a component.

member.name: P:Aspire.LoggingCategoriesAttribute.Categories
member.summary: The list of log categories produced by the component. These categories will show up under the Logging:LogLevel section in appsettings.json.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosConstants.CosmosApplicationName
member.summary: Defines the application name used to interact with the Azure Cosmos database. This will be suffixed to the Cosmos user-agent to include with every Azure Cosmos database service interaction.

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosConstants.EmulatorAccountKey
member.summary: Gets the well-known and documented Azure Cosmos DB emulator account key. See

member.name: F:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosConstants.EnableServerlessCapability
member.summary: Gets the well-known and documented capability value used to enable serverless mode for Azure Cosmos DB accounts.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB.CosmosUtils.ParseConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the connection string to extract the account endpoint and connection string.
member.remarks: The connection string can be in the following formats: A valid Uri AccountEndpoint={valid Uri} - optionally with [;Database={databaseName}[;Container={containerName}]] {valid CosmosDB ConnectionString} - optionally with [;Database={databaseName}[;Container={containerName}]]

member.name: T:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder
member.summary: Parses and manages connection strings in the form: Key1=Value1;Key2=Value2;... Preserves the exact placement of empty segments and semicolons. It also preserves spaces and case in keys and values.
member.remarks: This connection string builder should be used when you need to maintain the exact format of a connection string while adding or removing keys and values. When only parsing/reading connection string it is recommended to use as it handles escaping too.

member.name: P:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.ConnectionString
member.summary: The current connection string, always up-to-date.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The connection string to parse.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new empty instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.TryParse(System.String,Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder@)
member.summary: Tries to parse the given connection string into a . Returns true if parsing succeeds, false otherwise.

member.name: P:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the value associated with the specified key (case-insensitive). Returns an empty string if the value is empty, and null if the key does not exist. Setting a value to null removes the key/value pair and its following semicolon.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the specified key and its following semicolon (if present) from the connection string. Returns true if the key was found and removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.TryGetValue(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the value associated with the specified key (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:Aspire.StableConnectionStringBuilder.ToString
member.summary: Returns the connection string in the original order, preserving empty segments and semicolons.

member.name: M:Aspire.AzureCredentialHelper.CreateDefaultAzureCredential
member.summary: Creates a for code that can run in local development or deployed to Azure.

member.name: M:Aspire.AzureCredentialHelper.CreateDevelopmentAzureCredential
member.summary: Creates a optimized for local development by excluding credential types not applicable on developer machines.
